headline: Chevron (CVX) Faces DOJ Probe As Iran Tensions Raise Record Profit Stakes
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) is positioned for record profit potential as oil prices rise sharply following renewed U.S. Iran conflict. The U.S. government accuses major oil companies of price gouging and has directed the Department of Justice to open an investigation. Heightened political scrutiny is emerging at the same time that Chevron and its peers may see stronger earnings from higher crude prices. Chevron is one of the largest integrated energy companies, with operations that span crude oil...
